home.meta_title: Green Energy — Store every possible form of energy
home.meta_description: Sodium-ion cells, high-energy lithium-ion, supercapacitors. Full-stack energy storage from materials to systems.

hero.subtitle: From sodium-ion to supercapacitors — we redefine energy density, lifespan and the safety envelope of batteries through materials engineering.

items.label: Wh / kg
items.desc: Measured energy density of the high-nickel system, 28% above market average.

items.label: CYCLES
items.desc: Sodium-ion cycle life under 80% capacity retention.

items.label: EFFICIENCY
items.desc: Round-trip efficiency of the supercap hybrid system.

vision.label: 03 / VISION
vision.text: At the turn of the century — when fossil fuels phase out and renewables take over — energy storage becomes the critical node keeping civilization running. We innovate across materials, process and systems so that every watt-hour can be stored with care.

sodium-ion.name: Sodium-ion cell
sodium-ion.tagline: Abundant raw materials, low-temperature stability, and over 6,000 charge cycles. A scalable alternative to lithium for grid storage and commercial fleets.
sodium-ion.card_desc: Abundant raw materials, low-temperature stability, 6,000+ cycle life. A scalable alternative to lithium for grid storage and commercial fleets.

use_cases.title: Grid-scale storage
use_cases.description: Pair with renewables to deliver second-level frequency regulation and hour-level energy balancing.

use_cases.title: Commercial fleets
use_cases.description: Stable cold-start and long cycle life — best fit for urban delivery and fixed-route fleets.

use_cases.title: Off-grid solar
use_cases.description: Charge by day, discharge by night — strong capacity retention under high-frequency cycling.

use_cases.title: Telecom towers
use_cases.description: Backup power that endures temperature extremes — no air-conditioned shelter required.

lithium-ion.name: High-energy lithium-ion
lithium-ion.tagline: 340 Wh/kg high-nickel system with proprietary composite electrolyte — a dual breakthrough in energy density and safety. Built for EVs, aerospace, and consumer electronics.
lithium-ion.card_desc: 340 Wh/kg high-nickel system — a breakthrough in energy density and safety. Built for EVs, aerospace, and consumer electronics.

use_cases.title: EV powertrains
use_cases.description: High energy density + 4C fast charge — 500 km+ range with 15-minute charging.

use_cases.title: Aerospace power
use_cases.description: Lightweight pouch form-factor compliant with DO-311A aerospace power standards.

use_cases.title: Consumer electronics
use_cases.description: Slim form factor for laptops, drones and AR/VR devices.

use_cases.title: Medical devices
use_cases.description: Stable voltage platform for portable diagnostic instruments and powered surgical tools.

supercapacitor.name: Supercapacitor
supercapacitor.tagline: Sub-second charge/discharge, one million+ cycles. Paired with batteries in hybrid storage systems for peak power and regenerative braking.
supercapacitor.card_desc: Sub-second charge/discharge, 1M+ cycles — peak power and energy recovery for hybrid systems.

use_cases.title: Regenerative braking
use_cases.description: Capture kinetic energy and feed it back to electrical with 95%+ efficiency and millisecond response.

use_cases.title: Grid frequency regulation
use_cases.description: Million-cycle, maintenance-free response to high-frequency fluctuations from renewables.

use_cases.title: UPS backup
use_cases.description: Millisecond switchover with no maintenance schedule — replaces traditional lead-acid backup.

use_cases.title: Port cranes
use_cases.description: Recover energy from gantry crane lowering and shave power peaks; reduces diesel generator load.

technology.meta_description: From materials science to systems integration — our three-layer self-developed technology architecture.
technology.header_sub: From molecular material design to system-level energy management — every layer is self-developed.

items.title: Materials science
items.desc: Proprietary cathode materials and electrolyte formulations. Sodium-ion uses a layered oxide cathode; high-nickel Li-ion pairs with a composite solid electrolyte.

items.title: Process engineering
items.desc: Dry electrode coating with 98.5% yield. Single-line daily capacity of 2 GWh, with 70% less water consumption than conventional processes.

items.title: Systems integration
items.desc: Proprietary BMS chip + cloud energy-management platform. Supports Na-ion / Li-ion / supercap hybrid architectures with AI predictive maintenance.

items.content: Sodium-ion mass production line commissioned (Phase 1: 2 GWh)
High-nickel Li-ion 340 Wh/kg pilot line validation completed
Supercapacitor module passes automotive AEC-Q200 certification
Hybrid storage system (Na-ion + supercap) — first MW-scale site delivered

about.meta_description: The story, mission, and core team behind Green Energy Technology.
about.header_sub: From a Taipei lab in 2021 to a full-stack energy storage company — we focus on what comes after lithium.

story.label: 01 / OUR STORY
story.title: Redefining what energy storage can be
story.p1: Green Energy Technology was founded in 2021 by a team of researchers in electrochemistry, materials science, and energy systems. We believe the next generation of energy storage shouldn't just improve lithium batteries — it should start from fundamentally new materials.
story.p2_before: From the first sodium-ion prototype cell in our Taipei lab to three product lines and two production facilities, we've stayed focused on one thing:

mission.label: 02 / MISSION
mission.title: Mission & vision
mission.mission_text: Drive down energy storage costs through materials innovation, accelerating the global energy transition.
mission.vision_text: Become the #1 sodium-ion energy storage technology provider in Asia-Pacific by 2030.

team.label: 03 / TEAM
team.title: Core team
team.note: Team member photos and full bios will be updated before launch.

items.content: Taipei lab established; first sodium-ion prototype cell completed
Pre-Series A funding closed; pilot production line construction began
Supercapacitor line enters mass production; first customer deliveries
Na-ion production line commissioned (2 GWh); ISO 9001/14001 certified
High-nickel Li-ion enters pilot phase; team grows to 200+
